book_claims.claim: Listed as a source of omega-3 (0.37 g EPA/DHA per 75 g cooked)
book_claims.mechanism: Flatfish omega-3 source providing modest EPA/DHA

supplementary_research.finding: Sole and plaice provide lean protein, moderate omega-3, and low mercury; safe for 2–3 servings per week; not a primary omega-3 source but contributes to weekly totals
Regular white fish consumption as part of Mediterranean diet associated with reduced cardiovascular mortality even at modest EPA/DHA levels

nutrient_highlights.bioavailability_notes: Very lean protein; ideal for those monitoring calorie intake
Moderate; pairs with high-omega-3 species earlier in the week to reach weekly targets
Important for bone health; high bioavailability from fish

synergies.description: Sole is low in omega-3; pair with sardines or anchovies elsewhere in the week to hit EPA/DHA targets
Classic piccata preparation; capers add antioxidant quercetin and flavonoid content to a lean fish meal
Classic European pairing; vitamin C adds to mineral absorption and brightness to delicate flavor
